Config.title: Merchant Restocker
Config.budgetHint: Total spending budget in the active system's currency (gp for PF2E, credits for SF2E; UI display adapts automatically).
Config.equipmentVendor: Equipment vendor (50% uncommon + 25% rare, weapons/armor may roll runes)
Config.compendiumHint: Optional. If set, items are pulled only from this compendium and theme filters are skipped. Useful for food merchants tied to a custom survival pack.
Config.maxLevelHint: Optional cap. Items above this level are excluded from this merchant's pool. Leave blank for no cap.
Config.maxRarityHint: Cap the rarity of items this merchant carries. Equipment-vendor uncommon/rare guarantees are skipped silently if the cap is lower.

Notify.noUndo: No previous inventory snapshot to restore.

Error.notLoot: Actor must be a Loot actor.
Error.noTheme: No theme configured for this merchant.
Error.noBudget: Merchant budget must be greater than zero.
Error.emptyPool: No items found for theme '{theme}'. Make sure the relevant compendiums are loaded and that your level/rarity caps aren't too tight.
